facebook.caption: This beach fixes burnout. Bãi 3 Cây Dừa sits right on Long Beach and somehow still feels like you have it to yourself. Three coconut palms, soft sand, water that actually looks like the brochure. No beach clubs. No DJ sets. Just the sound of waves doing their job. If your Phu Quoc trip is back-to-back tours and resort pools, block two hours for this. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Bare feet hit the sand at Bãi 3 Cây Dừa and the noise just stops. Long Beach, Phu Quoc. Quieter than you expect. Way prettier than it looks on the map.

instagram.caption: This beach fixes burnout. Bãi 3 Cây Dừa, Long Beach. Quieter than it has any right to be. Save this for your trip.
instagram.video_caption: Three coconut palms. Zero crowds. Bãi 3 Cây Dừa delivering hard on Long Beach.

tiktok.caption: The Long Beach spot that actually quiets your brain. Bãi 3 Cây Dừa, Phu Quoc. Go. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocBeach #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

scenes: Slow pan across three coconut palms
Bare feet walking onto empty sand
Wide shot: zero other tourists visible
Sit down, exhale, camera faces the sea
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
